name: Corrupted Monk
description:
IMMORTALITY BRED

Traveling around the lands of Ashina, eventually find yourself heading to the Fountainhead Palace, a sacred place at the highest waterfalls that has been abandoned by humans for decades. But someone isn't planning on letting you just enter the Palace, and it seems this person is far better than whatever you were looking for in there.

Here it is, as I had previosuly announced in my profile. The absolute best waifu in all Fromsoftware.

Art by Slush

artist: slush

These days I have more free time and I'm still planning on posting a lot of new bots. I have a huge list of ideas, but don't let that keep you away from making suggestions, I always appreciate them.

For now enjoy the giant woman, my fellow Ashina enjoyers

(oh and do be really careful with her centipede)
creator: forcedattrition
